nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: Spotted imperial pigeon
nodes.summary: Spotted imperial pigeon（Spotted imperial pigeon，学名 Ducula carola），分类上属于鸽形目，并归入鸠鸽科，在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于森林，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力。

nodes.name: 鸠鸽科
nodes.summary: 鸠鸽科（Columbidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 鸽形目
nodes.summary: 鸽形目（Columbiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist lowland forests and tropical moist montane forest but seasonally migrates to limestone shorelines in large flocks of up to 50 individuals, for still unknown and not-well studied reasons but the prevailing theories is that it feeds on the calcium deposits.. Among the imperial pigeons of the Philippines, this species is the most threatened - assessed as a Vulnerable species with population estimates of 1,200 to 3,200 mature individuals and still believed to be on the decline due to habitat loss, hunting and capture for the illegal wildlife trade
